text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Now, for the results!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What, you ask? The fan votes for the Arima Kinen
are about to be announced on TV, dear Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My goal... is to break through to the top by a
landslide!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I can ill afford to fall behind the generation of
yore in any facet, including popularity.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sure you did great, Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto is here to watch as well. The results
are about to be revealed...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Next up, the votes for T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Da-dum-da-dum-da-da-da!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O's total comes out to...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
93,217 votes! Her spot in the Arima Kinen is
secured!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh... Oh... Ooohhh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I've done it... I've done it! Haaah hah hah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I should share my elation with all my adoring
subjects!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Aaah ha ha hah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ayabe! Ha ha ha, I say!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
What the?! Would you stay out of my room,
please?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After running around in an explosion of joy...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer, call a press conference.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it obvious? To announce my readiness to run
in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get a space prepared to hold the press
conference.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... While I highly doubt it, you don't
believe I'm setting myself up for disappointment,
do you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I know it's hard to believe. Suddenly, though, I'm
remembering what happened after my debut race.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I had full confidence in my prominence at the
time, but only a single reporter bothered to
attend.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah... It was so nice and quiet.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No, Doto. That was not my intent!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The thought comes to me every now and then.
Maybe all this glory I see... is merely a
fancy—something dreamt up by a king in the
midst of summer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps this dream will become a nightmare once
I open that door... to a barren, empty hall.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... How unlike me—to become frozen and
fearful of my dreams...
choice_data_list: Should I... open the door for you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, I shall do it. After all, I wish for you to always
see me in a dignified light.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Expel the nightmare! How could all the glory and
admiration I've received be a mere dream?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, let the gates open!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creeeak!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyeeeee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fears turn out to be unfounded. The
conference room is filled with people, people,
and more people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reporters with nothing but praise for T.M. Opera
O are packed into the room like sardines.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh, hehehe... How wondrous I feel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She would usually be cackling about now. But in a
rare turn of events, she simply chuckles.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Looking back, there was only one reporter at my
first conference, and my dinner show failed to
attract anyone.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But gaze upon this now. See how many people
have come, all for me.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on qualifying for the Grand Prix,
Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
You're looking as good as ever! Say something to
your fans!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This... This is what I've been pursuing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sniffle How... unbecoming... for the Overlord to shed tears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The turnout must be deeply moving for her. She
appears incredibly happy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O, would you like more eye drops?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Of course! With haste, Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...All an act.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Good evening to you all. And thank you for
taking the time to gather at this event.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've summoned you here so that I might express
the extent of my feelings on the overwhelming
support I've received from my fan base.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It will be in the form of a four-part, eight-hour epic entitled, The Tale of Opera O: Fury Upon Nakayama!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ughhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unsurprisingly, that has the reporters groaning,
but it seems the press conference is a big hit
nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. A great deal of time has
passed since my debut...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But I've only come this far due to your support.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So... I believe a small gift is in order.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, it's not yet ready. I shall present it
to you in half a month's time.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It will be the ultimate euphoria—victory at the
Arima Kinen, as well as the throne of greatest
trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My efforts will grant you these gifts. So, will you
wait for me... at that special place?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The throne—the Centurial Overlord's throne, to
be specific.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The winners' circle at the Arima Kinen... That is
the special place where I shall receive my crown!
